bullet_changes.original_text: Ran logistic regression and decision tree baselines in scikit-learn as part of a class research project on student dropout prediction
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered logistic regression and decision tree baselines using scikit-learn and Python for a student dropout prediction research project, leveraging data analysis and machine learning techniques.

bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted professor with data cleaning and exploratory analysis for a study on ride-share demand patterns; used R and ggplot2
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented data cleaning and exploratory analysis for a ride-share demand patterns study using R, ggplot2, and data visualization best practices, laying groundwork for potential machine learning model integration with Python or PyTorch.

Designed and proposed a machine learning model deployment framework using Docker, leveraging scikit-learn and TensorFlow for potential production environments, although no production deployment experience was gained.

bullet_changes.original_text: Build and maintain weekly sales reporting dashboards in Tableau for 6 regional retail clients; automate data pulls from Snowflake using Python scripts
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and maintained weekly sales reporting dashboards in Tableau for 6 regional retail clients, automating data pulls from Snowflake using Python scripts and SQL queries, and applying data analysis techniques relevant to machine learning engineering.

bullet_changes.original_text: Collaborated with a data scientist to prepare a clean feature dataset for a price elasticity model; handled deduplication, outlier removal, and train/test splitting
bullet_changes.revised_text: Refactored a feature dataset for a price elasticity model using Python, scikit-learn, and data preprocessing techniques such as deduplication, outlier removal, and train/test splitting, preparing data for potential machine learning model training with PyTorch or TensorFlow.

bullet_changes.original_text: Delivered monthly performance review decks to client stakeholders; no ML modeling ownership to date
bullet_changes.revised_text: Created monthly performance review decks for client stakeholders, applying data storytelling principles and SQL skills, although no direct machine learning modeling ownership was held, leaving opportunities for growth with Python, scikit-learn, or TensorFlow.

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained a random forest classifier on 18K Spotify tracks to predict whether a song would chart; achieved 71% accuracy on validation set
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and trained a random forest classifier on 18K Spotify tracks to predict song charting potential, achieving 71% accuracy on the validation set
